_meta.notes: All PVC-coated polyester products from Serge Ferrari (Précontraint line). Each entry is a 'Material Library' stub: basic metadata now; fetch images + colors per docs/material-approval-SOP.md when you use the record for a specific project RFA. Excludes explicitly PVC-free items (Canatex, Eden Life, Biobrane line).

entries.title: Soltis 86 Color, Alu
entries.main_application: Exterior solar protection with optimal transparency
entries.description: PVC-coated polyester screen fabric offering optimal transparency for exterior solar protection.

entries.title: Soltis 88 Color, Alu, Proof
entries.main_application: Thermal comfort with transparency; Proof variant is waterproof
entries.description: PVC-coated polyester. Combination of thermal comfort and transparency; Proof version adds waterproofing for overhead applications.

entries.title: Soltis 92 Color, Alu, Opaque Alu
entries.main_application: Maximal thermal and visual performance; opaque variants available
entries.description: PVC-coated polyester. High thermal and visual performance with color and aluminized back-face options.

entries.title: Soltis 96 Color, Proof
entries.main_application: Micro-perforated screen for fresher air on terraces
entries.description: PVC-coated polyester micro-perforated screen for terrace and facade applications. Proof variant is waterproof.

entries.title: Soltis 99 Color, Alu, White, LowE, Opaque
entries.main_application: Performance and design for indoor/outdoor solar comfort; LowE for thermal reflectance
entries.description: PVC-coated polyester. Multiple finish families: color, aluminized, white, LowE, and opaque.

entries.title: Soltis 622 Opaque Color
entries.main_application: Opaque solar protection with matte finish
entries.description: PVC-coated polyester opaque fabric with exceptional resistance, durability, and matte finish.

entries.title: Soltis Touch Color
entries.main_application: Interior light filtering with soft tactile finish
entries.description: PVC-coated polyester interior fabric that filters light with perfect clarity and a tactile finish.

entries.title: Soltis Veozip Color

entries.description: PVC-coated polyester designed for zip-on-track screens, delivering ventilation with solar protection.

entries.title: Soltis Loop Sunmate

entries.description: First-generation recycled-based Soltis for interior solar protection. PVC-coated on recycled polyester yarns.

entries.title: Soltis B28100 Safe Color
entries.main_application: Elegant solar protection for offices & homes with safety properties
entries.description: PVC-coated polyester fabric with safety-grade fire performance for office and residential solar control.
